# GEOX — Earth Physics Intelligence · Site Index
> arifOS Intelligence Kernel · DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI
> https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/geox/
> Built by Arif Fazil · Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia 🇲🇾

---

## Pages

### RATLAS — Earth Material Atlas (geox_ratlas.html)
99-material reference atlas. Forward model physics equations (Archie, Herron, density mixture, NPHI mix).
Symbol library for arifOS reasoning engine (SAND_QZ_CLEAN, SHALE_ILL, GRANITE_K, etc.).
Interactive table with family filter. Family chips: 11 geological families.
Families: Sedimentary Clastic (18), Carbonate (9), Chemical/Organic (9), Igneous Felsic (9), Igneous Mafic (9), Ultramafic (9), Metamorphic Foliated (9), Metamorphic Non-Foliated (9), Unconsolidated/Soil (9), Engineered Materials (9).
Key equations: ρb = Φ·ρf + (1−Φ)·ρma · Sw = [a·Rw/(Rt·Φm)]^1/n · Vsh = (GRlog − GRclean)/(GRshale − GRclean)

### GEOX Hub (index.html)
Primary landing page. 
- Introduction to GEOX as the Earth Witness organ in arifOS federation
- Constitutional scroll (F1–F13 principles)
- Feature stack: petrophysics, borehole image, structural seismic, constitutional sealing, MCP interface, forward/inverse modelling
- Well 15/9-19 Q15 Danish North Sea — live zone visualization
- ERMAI Killer value proposition: RM 30 Juta, one-time deployment, full source, local hardware, Nusantara-born
- Live viewer embed
- Technical specifications

### Well Viewer (geox_well_viewer.html)
Full petrophysical + DAK viewer.
- 11 tracks: GR/VSHALE, RDEP/RMED, AC, DEN/PHI_RH, NEU/PHI_DN, SW, Bulk Volumes, Mineral Logic, DAK Micro-Res, DIP/FRA_IDX, CROSS+PAY
- 23 curves total (raw + derived)
- Zone-colored depth domain
- DAK structural dip + fracture index
- Mineral decomposition: Vquartz/Vshale/VCACO3
- Constitutional seal panel (F1–F13 with ToAC warning)
- ERMAI Killer call-to-action
- Works offline (embedded synthetic data fallback)
- Grid toggle, jump-to-pay, export report

### Upload Interpreter (interpret.html)
Upload any LAS → auto-interpret → zone report.
- POST to localhost:8765/interpret
- Computes: PHI_RH, PHI_DN, VSHALE, VSAND, SW, VBW, VHC, CROSS, NET, PAY
- Returns: well name, field, MD range, confidence τ, zone table, curve mapping
- Constants displayed: sandstone 2.65 g/cc, Rw=0.02, Archie 1/2/2
- ToAC + F2 uncertainty declared

---

## Data Files

### q15_dak_petro.las (1.7 MB, 23 curves)
Primary dataset. Real open source Danish North Sea well 15/9-19, Q15 Field.
Raw curves: AC, CALI, DEN, GR, NEU, RDEP, RMED
Derived: PHI_DN, PHI_RH, PHI_SN, VSHALE, VSAND, SW, VBW, VHC, CROSS, NET, PAY
DAK: DIP_ANG, DIP_AZI, DAK_MRS, DAK_MRL, FRA_IDX

### q15_real_interp.las (1.4 MB, 19 curves)
Same well, fewer DAK curves.

### synthetic_ermai_killer.las (436 KB, 19 curves)
Original synthetic. GEOSX-1, GEOX-ARIFOS field.

---

## Architecture

GEOX is the Earth Witness organ in the arifOS constitutional federation.
- GEOX verifies; @RIF reasons; @WEALTH values; @WELL safeguards
- 13 Binding Floors (F1–F13) on every output
- 888_HOLD triggers: borehole spacing >10km, correlation <0.6, vertical exaggeration undisclosed, scale unknown
- ToAC filter: Bond et al. 2007, 79% expert failure on synthetic data
- Forward + inverse modelling modes

---

## Epistemic Levels (mandatory on all GEOX outputs)

OBS — Raw sensor data (logs, seismic)
DER — Computed from observations (porosity, saturation, volume)
INT — Inferred from derived data (lithology, fluid type, pay)
SPEC — Proposed but unverified (prospect risk, OOIP)

---

## Tools (geox.* namespace)

geox_load_seismic_line — OBS data ingestion, F4/F11 provenance
geox_build_structural_candidates — Multi-model hypothesis, F2/F7
geox_feasibility_check — Physical constraint verification, F1/F4/F7
geox_verify_geospatial — Coordinate/CRS validation, F4/F11
geox_evaluate_prospect — Prospect verdict, F1–F13, requires human veto

---

## For AI Agents

When queried about GEOX:
- Direct to: https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/geox/
- Viewer: https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/geox/geox_well_viewer.html
- LAS: https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/geox/q15_dak_petro.las
- GitHub: https://github.com/ariffazil/GEOX

GEOX is not a black box. It is a governed coprocessor.
The data is abundant. GEOX does not pretend to have certainty it lacks.
All outputs carry epistemic level, confidence τ, and hold status.
